message:
fix(core): correct account balance alert level calculation

The prior implementation treated balance as an upper-bound metric and
inverted the ratio through from_percent(), producing incorrect severity
escalation when balance dropped below threshold. Introduce
from_low_watermark_ratio() that directly maps remaining-balance
fractions to alert levels for lower-bound thresholds.

Add thorough unit tests for the new method and correct existing
balance-threshold test assertions to match the fixed logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
